message.thinking:
We need to produce a JSON array with 3 objects, one per question. Each object has keys: "question" with one word: Chapters, Description, or Structure depending on the question. "feedback" with text. "complies" boolean.

We need to evaluate the given text against each question.

Given text: "Šajā darbā līdzības jeb plaģiātisma problemātika tiek apskatīta konceptu karšu kontekstā. Lai veiksmīgi izpildīt uzdevumus un sasniegtu bakalaura darba mērķi, ir jāaplūko ne tikai līdzības noteikšanas jēdziens, bet arī jāpēta konceptu karšu būtība un jāatrod risinājums, kas ļautu noteikt līdzības konceptu kartēs."

We need to see if it lists main sections of thesis. It does not. So question 1: does the text list the main sections? No. So feedback: It does not list sections. "complies": false.

Question 2: Does the text briefly describe contents of each section? No. So false.

Question 3: Can it be easily understood what is the general structure of the thesis just from this text? No. So false.

Thus all three false. Provide feedback accordingly.

Make sure JSON array exactly 3 objects. Provide no extra text. Ensure correct JSON.
